summary: Three verification layers before shipping (Quality Gate + E2E + Standing Rules)
checklist: E2E live round-trip (exec, chain, health) verified?
Standing rules compliance checked (auto-push, Bono synced, watchdog, rules categorized)?

summary: Visual verification for display-affecting deploys
checklist: Screens showing correctly on all affected pods?

summary: Remote deploy sequence via RCAGENT_SELF_RESTART sentinel
Never taskkill + start rc-agent in same exec chain
Server deploy (racecontrol) 7-step procedure
Never run pod binaries on James PC
Test before upload — cargo test + Pod 8 canary first
touch build.rs before release builds after new commits
check_command: test $(git log --oneline -1 --format='%H' -- crates/*/build.rs) = $(git log --oneline -1 --format='%H') || echo 'WARNING: build.rs not touched after last commit'

summary: Smallest reversible fix first for production issues
Have a rollback plan before deploying critical paths
Tailscale SSH fallback for pod recovery when rc-agent is dead
Deploy staging path is C:\Users\bono\racingpoint\deploy-staging
Pendrive install via D:\pod-deploy\install.bat
Rebuild + redeploy after functional code commits
check_command: git log $(curl -sf http://192.168.31.23:8080/api/v1/health 2>/dev/null | node -pe 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("/dev/stdin","utf8")).build_id' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')..HEAD -- 'crates/racecontrol/src/**/*.rs' 2>/dev/null | head -1

summary: Server binary swap via rename, never overwrite running exe
Single-binary-tier policy — all pods run same binary, feature selection at runtime
Bono INBOX.md dual channel — git push + WS message
Auto-push + notify atomic sequence after every commit
Bono VPS exec via comms-link relay, not SSH
Standing Rules Sync to Bono after CLAUDE.md modifications
checklist: CLAUDE.md changes synced to Bono via comms-link?
Both AIs operating under same rules?

summary: No .unwrap() in production Rust code
check_command: grep -rn '\.unwrap()' $(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 -- '*.rs' 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null | grep -v test | grep -v '#\[cfg(test)\]' | grep -v '#\[test\]' | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: No any type in TypeScript code
check_command: grep -rn ': any' $(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v '.d.ts' | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: .bat files must be clean ASCII + CRLF, no parentheses in if/else
check_command: file deploy-staging/*.bat start-*.bat 2>/dev/null | grep -v ASCII | grep -v empty | grep -v 'No such' | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: Static CRT config present in .cargo/config.toml
Cascade updates recursive — update ALL linked references when changing a process
Next.js hydration — never read sessionStorage/localStorage in useState initializer
Git Bash JSON — write payloads to file, then curl -d @file
Never pipe SSH output into config files — use scp
UI must reflect config truth — no hardcoded camera lists, names, or layouts
Refactor Second — characterization tests first, verify green, then refactor
Cross-Process Updates — update ALL apps and ALL environments when changing a feature
DB migrations must cover ALL consumers with ALTER TABLE
Review parallel session commits against standing rules before deploying
checklist: git show <hash> reviewed against standing rules?
No bat parentheses, missing verification, or stale references?

summary: Convert timestamps UTC->IST before counting events
First-run verification after enabling any guard/filter/blocklist
checklist: Expected number of items flagged (not 'everything' or 'nothing')?

summary: No Fake Data — use TEST_ONLY or 0000000000
check_command: git diff HEAD~1 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '(john doe|jane doe|test@test\.com|555-|123-456)' | grep -v TEST_ONLY | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: Prompt Quality Check — ask one focused question before acting on ambiguous prompts
Links and References = Apply Now — apply shared references to current problem first
Learn From Past Fixes — check LOGBOOK + commit history before re-investigating
LOGBOOK entry after every commit
Verify the EXACT behavior path, not proxy metrics like build_id or health OK
checklist: Tested the EXACT data flow that was broken?
Not just health endpoint or build_id?

summary: Removed means removed from EVERY machine (server, pods, James)
Never move on from a failed operation — fix NOW or explicitly tell user
Audit what the CUSTOMER sees, not what the API returns
checklist: No overlay popups visible on screens?

summary: Investigate anomalies, don't dismiss them
checklist: Anomaly root cause verified, not assumed 'expected behavior'?

summary: NEVER restart explorer.exe on pods with NVIDIA Surround
Test display changes on ONE pod (Pod 8 canary) before fleet-wide
checklist: Change tested on Pod 8 canary first?
Display verified visually before other pods?

summary: Screenshot verification triggers taskbar auto-hide — verify physically instead
Fix during audit, don't just catalog issues
Context switches kill open investigations — park explicitly before switching
git log before calling builds old — different hash does not mean outdated
cmd.exe is hostile to quoting — use PID targeting or batch files instead
Verify monitoring targets against running system (netstat/tasklist), not docs
checklist: netstat/tasklist confirmed host:port for monitoring target?

summary: .spawn().is_ok() does NOT mean child started — verify alive after spawn
Non-interactive Windows context cannot launch interactive processes directly
MAINTENANCE_MODE sentinel is a silent pod killer — always clear before debugging
Session start — check for MAINTENANCE_MODE on all pods
checklist: All pods checked for MAINTENANCE_MODE sentinel?

summary: Audit changes must be cascade-audited before closing session
checklist: Downstream consumers identified for each change?
Each consumer tested for correct output?

summary: Cross-Process Recovery Awareness — recovery systems must not fight each other
Allowlist Auth RESOLVED — GET endpoints public, POST/DELETE require staff JWT
Process guard allowlist — fetch-at-boot + 5-min periodic re-fetch
Shipped means works for the user — runtime verification, not just compilation
checklist: UI pages render and are interactive?

summary: Long-lived tokio::spawn tasks must log lifecycle (start, first item, exit)
Cause Elimination Before Fix — 5-step process, never jump symptom to fix
Allowlist endpoints — GET public, POST/DELETE require staff auth
Process guard safe mode — use allowlist override, never disable entirely
Always preserve previous binary (*-prev.exe) before swap
Never deploy without a signed release manifest
Billing sessions must drain before binary swap on any pod
checklist: All pods with active billing sessions drained or checkpointed?

summary: OTA sentinel file protocol — write OTA_DEPLOYING at start, clear on complete/rollback
check_command: if [ -f C:/RacingPoint/OTA_DEPLOYING ]; then echo 'OTA in progress or stale sentinel'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

summary: Config push NEVER through fleet exec endpoint — use ConfigPush WS channel
check_command: grep -rn 'fleet.*exec.*config\|exec.*config.*push' crates/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v test | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: Rollback window — previous binary preserved for 72 hours minimum
No hardcoded IPs in new code (except network_map/config/README/CLAUDE)
check_command: git diff HEAD~1 -- '*.rs' '*.ts' 2>/dev/null | grep -E '192\.168\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | grep -v 'network_map\|config\|README\|CLAUDE\|test' | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

summary: No force push to main branch
Git config correct (james@racingpoint.in)
Standing rules synced to Bono after CLAUDE.md modifications
check_command: if git diff HEAD~1 --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'CLAUDE.md'; then grep -q "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" C:/Users/bono/racingpoint/comms-link/INBOX.md 2>/dev/null || exit 1; fi; exit 0
